items.name: 👑「Imperial Radiance Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
Step into elegance and authority with this white and gold coat dress. Flowing sleeves, intricate golden trim, and a noble silhouette make it ideal for avatars who embody leadership, purity, and power. A garment that radiates both grace and strength.
✨ Features
Snow-white fabric with luxurious golden edges
Long, flowing sleeves for a majestic presence
Noble coat design with refined tailoring
PBR detailing for a glowing, high-quality finish

items.name: Charming Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer
items.description:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Knits&Category=1&CreatorName=dubit&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Elevate your Halloween style with our Charming Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer, a bewitching addition to your Roblox avatar's wardrobe. This longline blazer effortlessly combines fashion and enchantment, featuring a captivating knitted design adorned with charming and alluring details. Whether you're exploring eerie landscapes or dancing at virtual Halloween gatherings, this blazer ensures you'll stand out in spellbinding style. The Charming Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer exudes an air of enchanting allure and elegance, making it the perfect choice for those who seek to captivate their audience. Elevate your avatar's charm and sophistication - get your Charming Blazer now and make your Halloween unforgettable!

items.description:
Dignity meets quiet menace.
A long burgundy coat lined with dark lapels, flowing elegantly like a mantle of command. It embodies restrained power — ideal for disciplined warriors or dark nobles.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sleek, flowing cut with commanding presence
Deep crimson tones for gothic or fantasy use
Suitable for mage, noble, or guardian avatars
PBR finish enhances subtle fabric gradients
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, long, gothic, elegant, warden, formal, noble, fantasy, PBR
Walk with order — rule with calm.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

This deep emerald trench coat combines a sleek futuristic design with sharp tailored lines, giving your avatar a bold and cinematic presence. The glossy finish and dramatic long cut make it perfect for adventurers, heroes, or anyone who wants to stand out in Roblox worlds.

💡 Why You’ll Love It
Rich emerald green with a striking glossy texture
Long trench design for a dramatic, stylish look
Perfect for roleplay, battles, or futuristic city adventures
